fix ubigint casting failures to bigint (issue #17135) (#20771)  The current implementation forces all UBIGINT to BIGINT. This leads to problems when the UBIGINT number is too large for a BIGINT (>= 2^63). This PR keeps the current behavior to cast UBIGINT to BIGINT as long as the number fits to BIGI
